channel.title: Retail on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Retail on WithinTrend — Trending Topics & Guides

item.title: Working at Barnes & Noble as a Bookseller: Pay, Pros, Cons & What to Expect
item.description: A comprehensive guide to working as a bookseller at Barnes & Noble, covering pay, daily tasks, pros, cons, and tips for new hires.
